# VOLOO by Shemoqmedi

> VOLOO is a digital menu platform and Surprise Bag (surplus food) marketplace for cafés and restaurants in Tbilisi, Georgia, built by Shemoqmedi. Diners tap an NFC tag or scan a QR code at the table to open the venue's live menu in the browser — no app required — ask a multilingual AI concierge about dishes, ingredients, and allergens (English, Georgian, Russian), and reserve Surprise Bags: good unsold food packed at the end of the day and sold at up to 50% off, paid by card online and picked up before closing.

## Key URLs

- Home (English): https://www.shemoqmedi.space/en
- Home (Georgian): https://www.shemoqmedi.space/ka
- Home (Russian): https://www.shemoqmedi.space/ru
- Venue catalogue on the landing page: https://www.shemoqmedi.space/en#venues
- Venue menus: https://www.shemoqmedi.space/en/menu/{venue-slug}
- Sitemap: https://www.shemoqmedi.space/sitemap.xml

## For consumers

- Browsing menus is free; no account or app installation is required.
- Tap the NFC tag or scan the QR code on the table to open the venue's live digital menu.
- Ask the AI concierge about ingredients, allergens, and dietary fit in English, Georgian, or Russian.
- Reserve a Surprise Bag of discounted surplus food, pay by card online (processed securely by Flitt, TBC Bank's payment platform), and pick it up at the venue before closing time.

## For venues

- Cafés and restaurants in Tbilisi join by invitation; joining is free at launch.
- Venues receive a hosted digital menu, NFC table tags, the AI concierge on their menu, and a listing in the Surprise Bag marketplace.
- Contact: hello@shemoqmedi.space

## Company

- Shemoqmedi — Tbilisi, Georgia
- Contact: hello@shemoqmedi.space
